---
title: "Dr Kostas Moschonas"
image: kostas_square.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/moschonask/
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=cvyy3CwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate
---

I am a Cardiologist and [British Heart Foundation](https://www.bhf.org.uk/what-we-do) Clinical Research Fellow specialising in Cardiac Magnetic Resonance, Echocardiography, and Inherited Cardiac Conditions.

My research focuses on the clinical impact of novel therapies for inherited conditions such as [Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy](https://www.bhf.org.uk/informationsupport/conditions/hypertrophic-cardiomyopathy). \[test\]
